attacking_style: Prefers attacking on descents or flat sections before climbs (17km Lombardia 2017, Stelvio descent 2017) rather than steep summit finishes. Opportunistic, exploiting crashes/mechanicals to gain time on rivals who hesitate to chase.
team_tactics: Relies heavily on domestique pacing on steep gradients (NIEVE 2017 Vuelta), but often tactically isolated in decisive moments. Conservative positioning on climbs followed by descent attacks when team support exhausted.
terrain_preference: Technical descents are signature weapon; struggles on sustained steep gradients (Angliru, Marmolada) and long time trials. Excels on moderate climbs with tactical descent opportunities (Lombardia lakeside attack).
vulnerability: Crumbles on steepest gradients in third week (Angliru 2017, Marmolada 2022). Time trials increasingly problematic with age (erratic pacing 2020). Cannot follow initial accelerations by pure climbers on HC summits.
key_patterns: Descent attacks after conservative climbing: Stelvio 2017, Lombardia lakeside 2017, Giro 2019 multiple occasions
Exploits rival misfortune for time gains: Roglič crash 2019, Pozzovivo crash 2022, DE PLUS crash 2017
Age-related decline visible: dropped early on climbs 2020-2022, erratic TT pacing, complete form loss by 2022
Bonus second hunting in group finishes when not contending stage wins: Vuelta 2017 multiple stages
Attacks 2-5km from summit then uses descent, not explosive summit accelerations like younger rivals
form_trajectory: negative: Complete competitive decline evident 2020-2022. Dropped early on moderate climbs (Villa d'Adda, Marmolada), solo attacks gain nothing (Mortirolo 2022), retirement at 2022 Lombardia confirmed monument-winning form irretrievable.
